## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory meeting between Victoria Treyger and Marcel Santilli to discuss GrowthX's AI-powered content marketing services and explore potential partnerships.](https://fathom.video/share/ojBJy5-KwFkQyGxeqCYZmKw7b4wC-Ysv?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers a comprehensive content marketing service combining AI workflows, human expertise, and strategic planning](https://fathom.video/share/ojBJy5-KwFkQyGxeqCYZmKw7b4wC-Ysv?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Their approach accelerates content production and ROI, reducing typical 12-month timelines to 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/ojBJy5-KwFkQyGxeqCYZmKw7b4wC-Ysv?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [GrowthX works with a diverse client base, from seed-stage startups to public companies, focusing on those with clear target audiences and product-market fit](https://fathom.video/share/ojBJy5-KwFkQyGxeqCYZmKw7b4wC-Ysv?tab=summary&timestamp=1243.0)
  - [Victoria expressed strong interest in GrowthX's offerings and plans to make introductions to potential clients](https://fathom.video/share/ojBJy5-KwFkQyGxeqCYZmKw7b4wC-Ysv?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's Background and GrowthX Origin

  - [Started career at IBM and HP, developed high-ROI content marketing strategies](https://fathom.video/share/ojBJy5-KwFkQyGxeqCYZmKw7b4wC-Ysv?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [Created AIMinds.com, growing to 300,000 subscribers in 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/ojBJy5-KwFkQyGxeqCYZmKw7b4wC-Ysv?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Launched GrowthX after successful workshops, reaching $2M revenue quickly](https://fathom.video/share/ojBJy5-KwFkQyGxeqCYZmKw7b4wC-Ysv?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [Now 70 people, working with 50+ companies including Webflow, Ram, Threaded, SentinelOne](https://fathom.video/share/ojBJy5-KwFkQyGxeqCYZmKw7b4wC-Ysv?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)

### GrowthX Service Model

  - [Three-layer approach: Service, Workflows, and Experts](https://fathom.video/share/ojBJy5-KwFkQyGxeqCYZmKw7b4wC-Ysv?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [Provides comprehensive strategy and execution, acting as "entire content function as a service"](https://fathom.video/share/ojBJy5-KwFkQyGxeqCYZmKw7b4wC-Ysv?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Utilizes AI coding agent for workflow creation, overseen by experienced content professionals](https://fathom.video/share/ojBJy5-KwFkQyGxeqCYZmKw7b4wC-Ysv?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [Offers full service for less than the cost of a single agency hire](https://fathom.video/share/ojBJy5-KwFkQyGxeqCYZmKw7b4wC-Ysv?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Week 1: Deep dives, artifact creation (company descriptions, personas, calibration guides)](https://fathom.video/share/ojBJy5-KwFkQyGxeqCYZmKw7b4wC-Ysv?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [Develop content clusters based on client's worldview and search opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/ojBJy5-KwFkQyGxeqCYZmKw7b4wC-Ysv?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)
  - [AI-powered workflows for assignment creation, research, fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/ojBJy5-KwFkQyGxeqCYZmKw7b4wC-Ysv?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
  - [Human editors and experts guide process, ensure quality and relevance](https://fathom.video/share/ojBJy5-KwFkQyGxeqCYZmKw7b4wC-Ysv?tab=summary&timestamp=1168.0)

### Client Examples and Results

  - [Showed Engine.com case study: Week 5, multiple pieces in various stages of production](https://fathom.video/share/ojBJy5-KwFkQyGxeqCYZmKw7b4wC-Ysv?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [Demonstrated Ramp's ongoing engagement with weekly team interactions](https://fathom.video/share/ojBJy5-KwFkQyGxeqCYZmKw7b4wC-Ysv?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Mentioned work with Biologica, a soon-to-launch women's health supplement company](https://fathom.video/share/ojBJy5-KwFkQyGxeqCYZmKw7b4wC-Ysv?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)

### Ideal Client Profile

  - [Companies with clear target audience and proven ability to monetize leads](https://fathom.video/share/ojBJy5-KwFkQyGxeqCYZmKw7b4wC-Ysv?tab=summary&timestamp=1243.0)
  - [Range from seed-stage startups with revenue to public companies](https://fathom.video/share/ojBJy5-KwFkQyGxeqCYZmKw7b4wC-Ysv?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)
  - [Seeking organic growth, audience ownership, or increased efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/ojBJy5-KwFkQyGxeqCYZmKw7b4wC-Ysv?tab=summary&timestamp=1319.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Victoria to discuss GrowthX with Alloy's CMO in the coming days](https://fathom.video/share/ojBJy5-KwFkQyGxeqCYZmKw7b4wC-Ysv?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
  - [Victoria to email Marcel's EA to schedule in-person meeting within the next month](https://fathom.video/share/ojBJy5-KwFkQyGxeqCYZmKw7b4wC-Ysv?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)
  - [Victoria to provide introductions to potential clients, focusing on those looking to scale](https://fathom.video/share/ojBJy5-KwFkQyGxeqCYZmKw7b4wC-Ysv?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
  - [Marcel to share more information about hiring needs for Victoria's network](https://fathom.video/share/ojBJy5-KwFkQyGxeqCYZmKw7b4wC-Ysv?tab=summary&timestamp=1483.0)
